result.reasoning: The series profiles PBMCs from Alzheimer's disease patients using a multi-omic 10x Chromium 5' approach, with samples clearly split into Gene Expression (scRNA-seq), CITE-seq ADT (TotalSeq-C), and TCR V(D)J libraries per patient. | Samples are clearly split by layer into Gene Expression (scRNA-seq), CITE-seq ADT (protein_surface), and TCR VDJ (TCR_VDJ); TotalSeq-C antibodies and TCR sequencing indicate the 10x Chromium 5' platform.
